channel.title: linux on Keith Kee
channel.description: Recent content in linux on Keith Kee

item.title: Manage Youtube Channels with Newsboat and mpv
item.description: Objectives: To manage all my favourite YouTube Channels as well as newsfeed. To avoid all the ads from Youtube. Softwares Required mpv: A minimal video player for terminal console.

item.title: Linux File Structure
item.description: Below is a table which explained all the file structure in Linux. With this table in place, it is easy to read and understand.

item.title: How to Use Crontab
item.description: Cron is a tool to configure scheduled tasks in Unix/Linux system. It is like Task Scheduler in Windows system. crontab is a command to edit all the scheduled tasks in the machine.
